description: Detects function calls in C/C++ that are commonly blocking (sleep, fread, recv, send, accept, connect, etc.). C and C++ lack native async/await -- this pipeline flags I/O and sleep calls that may block in event-loop or threaded contexts. JSON version cannot filter by function name.

flag.message: Function call detected -- verify this is not a blocking I/O or sleep call in a performance-sensitive context
